tasks.subject: Task 0: Marker helper module with unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure provider-agnostic primitives for generating, extracting, and indexing inline-comment markers.

**Files:**
- Create: `pr_agent/algo/inline_comments_dedup.py`
- Create: `tests/unittest/test_inline_comments_dedup.py`

**Verify:** `pytest tests/unittest/test_inline_comments_dedup.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pr_agent/algo/inline_comments_dedup.py", "tests/unittest/test_inline_comments_dedup.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/unittest/test_inline_comments_dedup.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["helpers implemented", "tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Base-class capabilities and config setting
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Declare new optional capabilities on GitProvider (no-op defaults) and expose persistent_inline_comments setting.

**Files:**
- Modify: `pr_agent/git_providers/git_provider.py`
- Modify: `pr_agent/settings/configuration.toml`

**Verify:** `pytest tests/unittest/ -x`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pr_agent/git_providers/git_provider.py", "pr_agent/settings/configuration.toml"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/unittest/ -x", "acceptanceCriteria": ["base-class methods added", "config setting declared"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: GitHub dedup implementation with tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement get_bot_review_comments, edit_review_comment and dedup-aware publish_code_suggestions on GithubProvider.

**Files:**
- Modify: `pr_agent/git_providers/github_provider.py`
- Create: `tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py`

**Verify:** `pytest tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pr_agent/git_providers/github_provider.py", "tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GithubProvider methods implemented", "publish_code_suggestions dedup-aware", "tests cover all modes & failure paths"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: GitLab dedup implementation with tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement get_bot_review_comments, edit_review_comment and dedup-aware publish_code_suggestions on GitLabProvider.

**Files:**
- Modify: `pr_agent/git_providers/gitlab_provider.py`
- Create: `tests/unittest/test_gitlab_inline_dedup.py`

**Verify:** `pytest tests/unittest/test_gitlab_inline_dedup.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pr_agent/git_providers/gitlab_provider.py", "tests/unittest/test_gitlab_inline_dedup.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/unittest/test_gitlab_inline_dedup.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GitLabProvider methods implemented", "publish_code_suggestions dedup-aware", "tests cover all modes & failures"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Document persistent_inline_comments setting
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add persistent_inline_comments row to /improve tool docs.

**Files:**
- Modify: `docs/docs/tools/improve.md`

**Verify:** `grep -n persistent_inline_comments docs/docs/tools/improve.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/docs/tools/improve.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n persistent_inline_comments docs/docs/tools/improve.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["new doc row added"]}
```
